_metadata.name: normal
_metadata.description: Standard single-column documentation template with sidebar and dark/light theme toggle
_metadata.author: MDOne

_comment_extra_css: List of external CSS URLs to inject into <head>. Example: ['https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/highlight.js/styles/github.css']
_comment_extra_js: List of external JS URLs to inject before </body>. Example: ['https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/highlight.js/highlight.min.js']
